meta.title: Localia — Find trusted local professionals
meta.description: Localia is a directory of trusted local professionals near you. Search by category and city, read reviews, and contact pros directly on WhatsApp.
meta.categoryDescription: Browse trusted {category} professionals on Localia. Compare ratings, see locations on the map, and contact them on WhatsApp.

footer.tagline: Find trusted local professionals and contact them directly.

aside.headline: Connect with trusted local professionals, wherever you are.
aside.discoverDesc: Search by category and city, see who's available, and find them on the map.
aside.trustDesc: Verified ratings and reviews from real clients help you choose with confidence.
aside.contactDesc: Message professionals directly on WhatsApp — no middlemen, no waiting.

login.heading: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your profile, reviews, and favorites.
login.demoSubtitle: Jump in with a pre-seeded account — no signup needed.
login.errorFallback: Could not sign in. Check your details and try again.

register.heading: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join Localia as a client or list your business as a professional.
register.roleClientHint: Search, review, and save the pros you trust.
register.roleProviderHint: Create a profile and get discovered by local clients.
register.name: Full name
register.errorFallback: Could not create your account. Please try again.

hero.title: Find the right professional, right where you are
hero.subtitle: Search verified pros near you by category and city. Read reviews, see them on the map, and reach out on WhatsApp.

featured.title: Featured professionals
featured.subtitle: Hand-picked pros with outstanding ratings.
featured.empty: Featured professionals will appear here soon.

categories.title: Browse by category
categories.subtitle: Eight professional fields, hundreds of trusted pros.

how.title: How Localia works
how.subtitle: From search to conversation in three simple steps.
how.step1Desc: Filter by category, city, rating, and availability to find the right fit.
how.step2Desc: Review profiles, ratings, services, and locations on an interactive map.
how.step3Desc: Message your chosen professional directly on WhatsApp in one tap.

mapPreview.title: Pros near you, on the map
mapPreview.subtitle: Every professional is pinned to their location so you can find help close by.

providerCta.title: Are you a professional?
providerCta.subtitle: Create a free profile, reach local clients, and grow your business on Localia.
